prompt: Using the provided reference image as the dog reference, recreate the same Shih Tzu as a clean, natural color photograph. Remove the telephone-card border, printed numbers, text, scratches, discoloration, and any overlay/censor block. Replace the original card/photo background with a sunny outdoor park setting: the dog lying on vivid green grass, with softly blurred trees and warm sunlight in the distance. Keep the dog centered and front-facing in a similar lying pose, preserving the black-and-white coat pattern and the two black hair bows. Improve the image quality to look like a sharp modern pet portrait with realistic fur detail, natural lighting, and shallow depth of field.
